message:
fix(error-codes): add missing FT-9004 (Cancelled) and FT-9005 (Panicked) catalog entries

The error renderer maps Cancelled→FT-9004 and Panicked→FT-9005 but these
codes had no catalog entries, causing get_error_code() to return None.
Proptest discovered this gap. Now all error codes have full catalog
definitions with causes and recovery steps.

Also restores the stronger assertion in proptest_error_renderer test 19:
all error codes must have catalog entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
